name: System Service Discovery
description: Detects enumeration of system services for reconnaissance
query:
// Detect service enumeration commands
// Trigger on multiple service query commands
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(sc\s+query|net\s+start|systemctl\s+list|Get-Service|wmic\s+service\s+list|service\s+--status-all)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 3
within 120 seconds
